name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants, Messages

VARIABLES participantStates, messageQueue, coordinatorState
coordinatorState == <<phase, voteYesCount>>
participantStates == [p \in Participants |-> <<phase, voteYes>>]

(* Message structure *)
Message == [sender \in {coordinator} \cup Participants,
           receiver \in {coordinator} \cup Participants,
           type \in Messages,
           content \in BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ coordinatorState = <<0, 0>> (* phase 0: waiting for votes *)
       /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> <<0, TRUE>>] (* phase 0: waiting for prepare *)
       /\ messageQueue = <<>> (* empty queue *)

(* Next state *)
Next == /\ coordinatorState' = <<1, 0>> (* phase 1: waiting for votes *)
        /\ \E p \in Participants:
              /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = <<1, TRUE>>] (* phase 1: voting *)
              /\ messageQueue' = Append(messageQueue, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> VoteYes, content |-> TRUE])
        /\ \E p \in Participants:
              /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = <<1, FALSE>>] (* phase 1: voting *)
              /\ messageQueue' = Append(messageQueue, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> VoteNo, content |-> FALSE])
        /\ \E p \in Participants:
              /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = <<2, TRUE>>] (* phase 2: commit *)
              /\ messageQueue' = Append(messageQueue, [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Commit, content |-> TRUE])
        /\ \E p \in Participants:
              /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = <<2, FALSE>>] (* phase 2: abort *)
              /\ messageQueue' = Append(messageQueue, [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Abort, content |-> FALSE])

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messageQueue>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = philosopher index who holds fork i, or 0 if free *)
Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
  \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[%(i, N)+1] = 0
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N)+1] = i]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N)+1] = 0]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ count > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES file, chunkSize, maxRetries, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks, RetransmitCount

Init == /\ file \in Seq
        /\ chunkSize \in Nat
        /\ maxRetries \in Nat
        /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
        /\ sentChunks \in Seq
        /\ receivedChunks \in Seq
        /\ file = <<>>
        /\ chunkSize = 1
        /\ maxRetries = 3
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ sentChunks = <<>>
        /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next == /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(file))
        /\ file' = Tail(file)
        /\ retransmitCount' = 0
        /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
        \/ /\ file' = file
           /\ retransmitCount' = RetransmitCount' + 1
           /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
           /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
        \/ /\ file' = file
           /\ retransmitCount' = 0
           /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
           /\ receivedChunks' = Append(receivedChunks, Head(file))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunkSize, maxRetries, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + delta[i]]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (clocks[i] + \Sum[j \in 1..N] clocks[j]) \div N]
        /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>> ==

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [i \in 1..2 |-> IF i = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE flag[i]]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [i \in 1..2 |-> IF i = 2 THEN FALSE ELSE flag[i]]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [i \in 1..2 |-> IF i = 1 THEN FALSE ELSE flag[i]]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator

---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Client -> SUBSET Pages]

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == 
  /\ turn = 1
  /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == 
  /\ turn' = turn
  /\ wants' = wants
  /\ \/ /\ turn = 1
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ wants[2] = FALSE
       /\ wants' = <<TRUE, FALSE>>
  \/ /\ turn = 2
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ wants[2] = FALSE
       /\ wants' = <<FALSE, TRUE>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
       /\ wants[1] = TRUE
       /\ wants[2] = FALSE
       /\ turn' = 2
  \/ /\ turn = 2
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ wants[2] = TRUE
       /\ turn' = 1
  \/ /\ turn = 1
       /\ wants[1] = TRUE
       /\ wants[2] = TRUE
       /\ turn' = 2
  \/ /\ turn = 2
       /\ wants[1] = TRUE
       /\ wants[2] = TRUE
       /\ turn' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ turn \in {1, 2}
  /\ wants \in {<<FALSE, FALSE>>, <<TRUE, FALSE>>, <<FALSE, TRUE>>, <<TRUE, TRUE>>}
